title: Robust Ruby Portuguese Tofu Skewers
description: A sour and savory post-workout dish featuring miso-marinated tofu, dark brown sugar, and a glassy-jelly texture, inspired by Portuguese cuisine and macrobiotic-friendly ingredients. This recipe is perfect for a healthy and flavorful snack or dinner.

ingredients.name: extra firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into 1 inch cubes

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together miso paste, dark brown sugar, apple cider vinegar, and olive oil to make the marinade.
Add the garlic and ginger to the marinade and stir to combine.
Add the tofu cubes to the marinade and toss to coat.
Thread the marinated tofu cubes onto the bamboo skewers.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20 minutes.
While the tofu is baking, prepare the glassy-jelly sauce by whisking together 1/4 cup of water and 2 tablespoons of cornstarch in a small saucepan.
Bring the sauce to a boil over medium heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove the skewers from the oven and brush with the glassy-jelly sauce.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with chopped scallions and a side of steamed vegetables.
